steps.t: Ost Guruth lies in the Lone-lands, far to the east of Bree-land, along the Great East Road. Nidgyl has told you to begin your patrol of the Lone-lands…
Ost Haer lies in the Grimfens in the Lone-lands, south of Ost Guruth, far to the east of Bree-land. Nidgyl has asked you to scout the ruins of Ost Hae…
Dol Vaeg lies in the Lone-lands, far to the east of Bree-land, west of the Last Bridge. Nidgyl has asked you to climb the spire of Dol Vaeg, a tall hi…
Nan Dhelu lies in the Lone-lands, far to the east of Bree-land, north-east of Dol Vaeg. Nidgyl has asked you to scout the ruins of Nan Dhelu.
Nidgyl is at Bree-town in Bree-land, far to the west of the Lone-lands. You should report to Nidgyl and tell him what you have found in the eastern Lo…
